why: CHART: 6-min ascending coil, higher lows (7477>7482>7489>7493>7496) pressing flat 7500 resistance, momentum turned up (15m +0.12%), price above VWAP 7485 = bullish continuation pressing a breakout. GEX CONFIRM: deeply negative-gamma (-88M near-spot); a break of the 7500 barney (-36M king) forces short-gamma dealers to chase = upside fuel; day already printed 7507 so room to run; pika floor building 7455 + VWAP 7485 support below. Tight leash: exit if it rejects back under VWAP.

CHART: breakout thesis failed to confirm — 6th rejection at 7500, price rolling back to 7497 with momentum flat, no reclaim/hold above the barney. GEX: barney reasserting (-37M) and net gamma deepening to -97M; the break-fuel never triggered because the break never held. Exit fast per plan, take the scratch near breakeven rather than round-trip to VWAP.

CHART: fresh afternoon momentum push 7494->7506 (+11pts), then 6-min tight bull flag holding the day high 7505-7506 without fading — sellers cannot push it back, coiled to break 7507 into clear air. Above VWAP 7490, above the 7500 barney. GEX CONFIRM: overhead node flipped from 7500 barney to 7520 PIKA (+19.5M) = clear air +14pts; price above the huge 7500 barney (-74M) so in negative gamma a hold/break forces short-gamma dealers to chase up; strong pika FLOOR 7495 (+25M) support beneath. This is the structurally clean version the morning break lacked. Target 7520 pika; stop on a fade back below 7500.

CHART: breakout ran +4.5pts from 7506 entry to 7510.5, now stalling — momentum cooling (15m +0.18%->+0.10%), price ticked down off the high, at the day extreme (99% of range) that rejected all day. GEX: transient 7515 barney showed dealer resistance just overhead; next node 7520 pika not being reached as momentum fades. CAP the 0DTE winner per method — bank the gain into the stall rather than round-trip back through the 7500 barney.

CHART: sustained breakdown — 4 lower closes (7497->7495.6->7493.5->7492.1) breaking below the 7495 pika AND below VWAP 7492.67, price now pinned at the recent low 7492, held 2+ min (NOT the instant-bounce fake of 14:17). GEX CONFIRM: the day strongest floor, the 7495 pika (was +43M), has COLLAPSED — nearest floor dropped all the way to 7425, a ~67pt air pocket; net gamma deepest of day (-134M) = violent-move fuel in negative gamma; 7500 barney (-84M) now overhead resistance capping bounces. Target the air pocket toward 7480/7470, cap into any stall. Stop: reclaim of 7495 (pika rebuilds = thesis dead).

CHART: breakdown-flush thesis failed — 6 min in, price grinded UP 7492->7494.6 instead of flushing into the air pocket, momentum flipped positive (5m +0.03%), now pressing my 7495 reclaim stop. Charts lead and price action is the opposite of my thesis. GEX: pika nominally still collapsed (7425) but price refuses to go, and the 7500 barney magnet risks pulling it back up (bigger loss). Cut the non-working short for a small loss per plan rather than hope.

CHART: real 3-candle breakdown 7498.8->7494.5->7490.2->7489.3 (-9.5pts) below VWAP 7492.80, price actively falling, not the slow grind of the 14:39 fake. GEX CONFIRM (much stronger than 14:39): the pika floor is now COMPLETELY GONE — >>NONE, no support under price<< vs merely dropping to 7425 last time; net gamma spiked to extreme -167M (day deepest by far) = violent-flush fuel; 7500 barney (-79M) now overhead resistance. Late day (15:06) with zero support below = high flush potential. Target continuation to 7480/7470, cap into any stall. Stop: reclaim of 7495.

CHART: air-pocket flush delivered — rode 7489.3->7483 (-6pts), now stalled one minute at 7483 right on the 7480 barney (next opposing node). GEX: 7480 barney (-83M) is real support-when-below (barneys bounced price all day); extreme -198M gamma cuts both ways but the day has mean-reverted every flush. CAP the 0DTE winner into the opposing node per method — same discipline that correctly banked my breakout long at the 7510 stall. Lock the gain rather than risk a round-trip bounce off 7480.
